creator: des@flood.ping.uio.no
text:
The Makefile for w3m-ssl has W3M_VER misspelled, and therefore fails
to fetch the distfile.

Fix: 

PORTNAME=      w3m-ssl
-PORTVERSION=   ${W3m_VER}
+PORTVERSION=   ${W3M_VER}
 CATEGORIES=    www ipv6

 MASTERDIR=     ${.CURDIR}/../../www/w3m--FiynGmLdze4dUNuNeVDiVqHeNPGUY05RSUIqcHSnvXjUdosY
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/w3m-ssl/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.5
diff -u -r1.5 Makefile
--- Makefile    2000/04/10 00:07:09     1.5
+++ Makefile    2000/04/11 11:26:09
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/www/w3m-ssl
# make fetch
